item.description:
Location:
Description:

Vacancies are available for full crew on Walk-to-Work (W2W) offshore vessels, specifically the Windkeeper Offshore type. This role offers a competitive salary with a contract duration of 1 month. The positions are suitable for skilled seamen seeking employment in the offshore sector.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Offshore Crew Vacancy - Walk-to-Work Vessel at Pronaviga

item.description:
Location: Offshore
Description:

A Plumber is sought for an offshore operation vessel within the Oil & Gas Sector. The role involves performing repairs and installations on vessel plumbing systems, troubleshooting, and reading system drawings. Candidates require a technical degree and 3-5 years of experience in the Oil and Gas construction industry, with good English and Azerbaijani language proficiency.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Plumber Job on Offshore Operation Vessel at HRC | Business Process Outsourcing

item.description:
Location: Offshore DRC
Description:

Experienced Senior Dynamic Positioning Officers (SDPOs) are sought for an urgent geotechnical coring campaign offshore the Democratic Republic of Congo. The contract is for approximately two weeks with a possibility of extension. Candidates must have proven experience as an SDPO on geotechnical or drilling vessels. Joining is required as soon as possible.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] SDPO Job - Offshore Geotechnical Coring Campaign at ORCA Crew Services

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Urgent offshore oil and gas drilling positions are available, including Safety Officer, Mechanical Technician, Welding Foreman, Crane Operator, Floorman, Roustabout, and Rig Welder. Salaries range from $900 to $2,500 per month depending on the role. Interested candidates can find application details via the provided link.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Offshore Oil Gas Drilling Jobs - Multiple Positions $900 to $2,500 at GULF JOBS

item.description:
Location: Libya
Description:

Experienced professionals are sought for an Oil & Gas Project in Libya. Open positions include Painters & Blasters, Certified 6G Welders, Certified Scaffolders, HSE Officers, Pipe Fitters, Crane Operators, Heavy Equipment Operators, Laborers, Steel Fabricators, Foremen, Mechanical Technicians, and Instrument Technicians. The role offers an attractive salary package with free accommodation and transportation. This is an opportunity for career growth on world-class projects.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Oil Gas Project Vacancies in Libya at Stepping Stone HR

item.description:
Location: Abu Dhabi
Description:

An offshore project in Abu Dhabi is seeking a Lead for Heavy lift & Over Dimensional Cargo (ODC) operations. This role requires 10-12 years of experience in the design and execution of heavy lifting, ODC transport, route surveys, and coordination with Marine Warranty Surveyors. Candidates with experience in ADNOC projects, EPC, freight forwarding, oil & gas, and petrochemical sectors are preferred. The fixed-term contract duration is approximately 30 months.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Lead Heavy Lift ODC Engineer - Offshore Project at CC7 GES

item.description:
Location: Abu Dhabi, UAE
Description:

A Senior Electronics Technician is sought for offshore marine construction projects in Abu Dhabi, UAE. Responsibilities include installation, maintenance, and troubleshooting of marine electronics, control, and automation systems. The role requires a Diploma in Electronics Engineering and a minimum of 5 years of relevant experience. The work schedule involves 12-hour duties with a rotation of 150 days on and 43 days off. Online interviews will be conducted.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Senior Electronics Technician Job - Offshore Marine Construction at Expo Universe

item.description:
Location: UAE
Description:

Experienced Electronic Technicians are sought for roles involving the installation, commissioning, maintenance, and repair of marine electronics, control, and automation systems on offshore marine construction vessels. The position requires hands-on experience with marine communication, navigation, and entertainment systems, PLC, HMI, VFDs, instrumentation, and heavy lift crane automation. A Diploma in Electronics Engineering and a minimum of 2 years of relevant experience are necessary. Salary offered is AED 4,680 – 7,312.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Electronic Technician Job on Offshore Construction Vessels at Libra International Services

item.description:
Location: UAE
Description:

Multiple skilled positions are available for offshore operations in the UAE, requiring a minimum of 3 years of relevant experience. Roles include operators for drilling, anchors, pipe facing, winching, cable laying, and grouting, along with supervisors for these areas. Candidates should possess a valid passport and offshore experience on barges, production facilities, or marine vessels. GCC experience is preferred. This is a long-term opportunity with immediate departure, offering attractive salaries and overtime.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Offshore Job Openings in UAE - Immediate Departure at Ambe International-Recruitment and Mobility

item.description:
Location: Chennai / Mumbai
Description:

Hiring is open for various positions on offshore barges and marine vessels, with a leave rotation of 150 days on and 43 days off. Mandatory experience in offshore production or marine vessels is required, with a minimum of 3-5 years of Gulf experience. Benefits include free food, accommodation, and transportation. Attractive salary plus overtime is offered. Client face-to-face interviews will be held in Chennai on July 16th & 17th and in Mumbai on July 19th & 20th.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Offshore &amp; Marine Vacancies - Client Interview at NMDC UAE
